schema_output.scene_summary: Muslims rejoice and celebrate the peace agreement
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 253
schema_output.moral_lesson: The importance of peace and unity in the community

characters.name: Muslim Community
characters.appearance: modestly dressed men and women of varying ages and builds, dressed in white robes and head coverings, smiling and embracing each other

schema_output.narrative_text: The Muslims of Medina rejoice at the news of the peace agreement, smiling and hugging each other in celebration of their newfound unity.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A bustling 7th century Medina street scene with adobe buildings and packed-earth roads in warm earth tones. Late afternoon golden sunlight casts long shadows across the scene. In the center of the street, a group of smiling and embracing men and women of various ages and builds, dressed in white robes and head coverings, their faces filled with joy and gratitude. In the background, a tall palm tree stands, its branches swaying gently in the breeze. Soft warm golden light, lively and celebratory mood. Medium wide shot from above. Warm beige, golden, and blue palette with touches of green from the palm tree. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
